name: Notion
longDescription:
Notion is an all-in-one workspace that combines documents, databases, wikis, and project boards in a single linked tree of pages. Pages are built from blocks like text, headings, tables, and embeds, and any database can be viewed as a table, board, calendar, list, gallery, or timeline.

Individuals use it for personal notes, journaling, and habit tracking, while teams use it for company wikis, product specs, meeting notes, and lightweight project management. Sharing is granular: pages can be private, shared with specific people, or published as public sites.

Notion AI adds writing, summarization, and Q&A on top of workspace content, and a growing template gallery and API ecosystem make it easy to start from existing setups or integrate Notion with other tools.

features.title: Block-based editor
features.description: Build pages from rich blocks including text, tables, toggles, embeds, and synced content.

features.title: Flexible databases
features.description: The same data can be displayed as a table, board, calendar, gallery, list, or timeline view.

features.title: Team wikis
features.description: Verified pages, owners, and structured navigation make Notion suitable for company-wide knowledge bases.

features.title: Notion AI
features.description: AI features can draft, summarize, translate, and answer questions using content from your workspace.

features.title: Templates and API
features.description: Thousands of community templates and a public API help bootstrap setups and integrate with other tools.

features.title: Granular sharing
features.description: Pages can be kept private, shared with specific people, or published as public sites with a single switch.

useCases: Building a personal second brain for notes, tasks, and reading lists
Running a company wiki with onboarding docs and team handbooks
Tracking projects with linked databases and timeline views
Writing and reviewing product specs collaboratively with comments
Publishing a lightweight public site or portfolio from a Notion page

faq.question: Is Notion free?
faq.answer: Notion has a free Personal plan with unlimited pages; Plus, Business, and Enterprise tiers add more guests, history, and admin features.

faq.question: Does Notion work offline?
faq.answer: Recently opened pages are cached for offline viewing, but full offline editing and search require a connection.

faq.question: Can I export my data?
faq.answer: Yes, pages and workspaces can be exported as Markdown, HTML, PDF, or CSV at any time.

faq.question: Is Notion AI included?
faq.answer: Notion AI is an add-on with its own price per member, although Business and Enterprise plans bundle it on certain offers.
